steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The colon reveals “there is no better example of the form”—the speaker is asserting that Kathleen Atkins Wilson's work is unsurpassed.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Eclipsed means to surpass or outshine—if no one has ever eclipsed her work, it remains unmatched. Convened (assembled), augmented (increased), and cited (referenced) don't express surpassing. That matches choice B — B is correct.
